---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for VelinStyle
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear description of the problem or need this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Include code examples if possible:

```html
<!-- Example usage -->
<div class="velin-new-component">...</div>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Accessibility Considerations

How should this feature handle:

- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Screen reader support
- [ ] Color contrast
- [ ] Reduced motion
- [ ] RTL support

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here. Mention if the feature touches **Web Components**, the **CLI** (`velinstyle build`, `scan`, `icons`), or **themes / tokens** only.
